title: Docplexus is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Docplexus is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Docplexus invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Full Stack Developer at our Allahabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Docplexus:
Docplexus is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Docplexus!
